name: oma-forge
description: Local dev environment for building, running, and debugging Open Multi Agent workflows

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @oma-forge/shared && npm run build -w @oma-forge/reporter && concurrently -n web,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @oma-forge/web" "npm run dev -w @oma-forge/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @oma-forge/shared && npm run build -w @oma-forge/reporter && npm run build -w @oma-forge/server && npm run build -w @oma-forge/web && npm run build -w oma-forge
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @oma-forge/shared && npm run lint -w @oma-forge/reporter && npm run lint -w @oma-forge/server && npm run lint -w @oma-forge/web && npm run lint -w oma-forge
scripts.test: npm run test -w @oma-forge/server && npm run test -w oma-forge
